_source: https://github.com/smogon/pokemon-showdown/blob/master/config/formats.ts and data/rulesets.ts (real fetch during development - see accuracy_addons/README.md for exactly what was/wasn't captured)
_note: Only the Champions-relevant entries were kept, not the full formats.ts (hundreds of unrelated formats). Reg M-A is the entry Showdown actually had a distinct format for at fetch time; Reg M-B (this project's ADAPTER-configured current regulation, per adapters/pokemon/doubles.json's regulation_active_until: 2026-09-02) was NOT found as its own distinct formats.ts entry in this fetch - either it hadn't been added to Showdown's config yet, or it was further into the file than the fetch reached. Treat the Reg M-A data below as 'closely related predecessor format, same mod/structure', not a direct Reg M-B confirmation.

Flat Rules.desc: The in-game Flat Rules: Adjust Level Down 50, Species Clause, Item Clause = 1, -Mythical, -Restricted Legendary, Bring 6 Pick 3-6 depending on game type.

Standard.desc: The standard ruleset for all official Smogon singles tiers (Ubers, OU, etc.)
